topics.title: American Idol and Virginia Tech Shooting Discussion
topics.summary: The studio discusses a contestant's performance on American Idol, Simon Cowell's reaction to a tribute for the Virginia Tech shooting victims, and details regarding the perpetrator of the massacre.

topics.title: School Shooting Analysis and Arizona Travel
topics.summary: The studio discusses the details of a school shooting, the profiles of the victims, and the appeal of the Arizona desert for outdoor activities.

topics.title: Audio Equipment and Media Preferences
topics.summary: The studio discusses high-end audio systems, the nuances of home theater setups, and various favorite albums and television shows.

topics.title: Marital Struggles and Voicemail Humor
topics.summary: The studio explores a listener's failing marriage, the absurdity of rural voicemails regarding snapping turtles, and various comedic segments involving celebrity interactions.

topics.title: Radio Show Commentary and Guest Interactions
topics.summary: The studio features a series of segments including listener messages, discussions on celebrity media presence, and candid conversations regarding personal relationships and past experiences.

topics.title: Intern Dating and Upcoming Roast
topics.summary: The studio discusses an upcoming roast for Andy Dick, the use of a driver alert earpiece, and a conversation with an intern named Jenny regarding her interest in Artie.

topics.title: Miss High Times and Jennifer Steele Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts interview Miss High Times and porn star Jennifer Steele, who discuss their involvement with High Times magazine, marijuana culture, and a specialized smoking device.

topics.title: Human Hookah and High Times Promotion
topics.summary: The studio features a demonstration involving a performer acting as a human hookah while guests discuss the upcoming 420 holiday and promote High Times magazine.

topics.title: Media Controversies
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding the firing of Howard Stern's former colleague, the impact of racial rhetoric in media, and an interview with Al Rosenberg about his experiences working for Howard Stern.

topics.title: Social Issues and Personal Habits
topics.summary: The studio explores topics including the motivations behind certain crimes, cultural perceptions, and the personal challenges of breaking long-standing speech habits.

topics.title: Paul Mooney Interview and Campus Safety Discussion
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with comedian Paul Mooney regarding his career and a subsequent discussion on the complexities of active shooter situations at schools.

topics.title: Game Show Hosts and Local Liquor Conflict
topics.summary: The studio discusses the legacy of game show hosts like Bob Barker, reviews upcoming segments for the wrap-up and intern shows, and reports on a physical altercation involving a local club manager and liquor authority officials.

topics.title: Virginia Tech Shooting Coverage
topics.summary: The studio discusses the aftermath of the Virginia Tech shooting, including student testimonies, the shooter's identity, and the president's response to the tragedy.

topics.title: Virginia Tech Shooting Response and Media Violence
topics.summary: The studio discusses the aftermath of a shooting at Virginia Tech, including advice for parents on communicating with children about the event, debates over the role of video games in violence, and updates on legal cases and entertainment news.
